# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`go test ./...`, `pnpm test`)
- [ ] `docs/` updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` — **required** for PRs into `main`
- [ ] No new secrets, tokens, or keys in logs or error messages

<!--
If this PR intentionally skips the CHANGELOG (e.g. pure CI tweak, typo fix,
or dependency bump with no user impact), add the `skip-changelog` label.
-->
